_doc: Electricity tariff model for the Energy-tab cost/savings breakdown. Copy this file to config/tariff.json (gitignored) and fill in YOUR rates from your electricity invoice. See docs/tariff-model.md for how each field maps to a Spanish PVPC 2.0TD bill and how to derive the per-period prices. All prices below are PRE-TAX (energy commodity + access tolls + system charges); electricity tax and VAT are added by the app. When config/tariff.json is absent the app falls back to a flat 0.10 EUR/kWh estimate.
